stages.name: Implementation Phase
stages.description: Build the solution based on research findings

stages.name: Synthesis Phase
stages.description: Merge outputs into a cohesive plan

stages.name: Decision Phase
stages.description: Evaluate business value and approve next steps

stages.name: Quality Phase
stages.description: Score the run and extract learnings

stages.name: Memory Capsule
stages.description: Capture a durable run summary for reuse
